methodsAttempted.query: site:ua.es OR site:universidaddealicante.es Universidad de Alicante inteligencia artificial generativa docencia evaluacion proteccion datos politica
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned official University of Alicante pages from the Institute of Education Sciences, the IT Service, and the Data Protection Delegation sitemap.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ua.es ChatGPT plagio integridad academica Universidad de Alicante
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found an official ICE training page about ChatGPT in teaching and several repository PDFs; repository scholarship was not used as policy evidence.

robots.txt for the official domain allows generic public crawling while disallowing many named bots and specific administrative/static paths; fetched pages were public official pages and were not login-gated.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found two claim-grade official UA pages: an ICE generative-AI resource page and an IT Service page about AI services available with UA accounts. An ICE training page was used only for a narrow teaching-training claim. A Data Protection sitemap and repository PDF result were rejected as non-claim-grade policy evidence.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Search result described a PDF about whether ChatGPT could write a master's thesis, but it is an institutional repository item rather than university-issued guidance.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: IA generativa. Recursos. Formación y guías: Docencia en la era de la Inteligencia Artificial; Recomendaciones para la docencia con inteligencias artificiales generativas. Políticas académicas: Guide to integrating generative artificial intelligence technologies into teaching and learning processes. UNED; Guía básica sobre el uso de la Inteligencia Artificial para docentes y estudiantes.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Generative AI resources. Training and guides include teaching in the age of AI and recommendations for teaching with generative AI. Academic policy links include guides for integrating generative AI into teaching and learning.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Page heading and resource lists under Formación y guías and Políticas académicas

artifacts.sourceTitle: Servicios de inteligencia artificial con cuentas UA
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Las cuentas de servicios externos de la UA (@gcloud.ua.es y mscloud.ua.es) permiten acceder a 3 chats de IA. En algunos casos, las interacciones con estos servicios no se usarán para entrenar las IA. Lee cada caso para saber cuáles son las condiciones particulares de los servicios.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: UA external-service accounts (@gcloud.ua.es and mscloud.ua.es) allow access to three AI chats; in some cases interactions with these services will not be used to train the AI, and each service's conditions should be read.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Servicios de inteligencia artificial con cuentas UA
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Si usamos la cuenta @gcloud.ua.es para iniciar sesión, Google anuncia que "los chats y ficheros subidos por los usuarios no los examinarán revisores humanos ni se usarán de ninguna otra manera para mejorar los modelos de IA generativa". NotebookLM está cubierto por los mismos términos de servicio que Gemini si utilizas una cuenta de @gcloud.ua.es: los datos no los tratan revisores humanos y no se utilizan para entrenar la IA.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: When signing in with @gcloud.ua.es, the page reports Google's statement that user chats and uploaded files will not be reviewed by human reviewers or used to improve generative-AI models; NotebookLM has the same terms when using @gcloud.ua.es.

artifacts.sourceTitle: CHATGPT: OPORTUNIDAD Y RETO PARA LA DOCENCIA. ¿QUÉ VAS A HACER?
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Destinatarios: Personal PDI de la UA. Descripción: En este curso se analizará ChatGPT, una herramienta de IA generativa de texto introducida a finales de 2022, y sus implicaciones para la docencia universitaria. Contenidos: Oportunidades de ChatGPT en la docencia: automatización de tareas, mejora de la productividad, etc. Retos de ChatGPT en la docencia: plagio, dificultades de evaluación, etc.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The course was addressed to UA teaching and research staff and analyzed ChatGPT's implications for university teaching, including teaching opportunities and challenges such as plagiarism and evaluation difficulties.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Destinatarios, Descripción, Objetivos and Contenidos sections

artifacts.notes: Approve as a narrow source-status claim only; the source is a resource hub and does not establish binding university-wide rules.
Approve as an IT-service availability claim scoped to the official page's description of UA external-service accounts and AI chat access.
Approve with wording limited to what the IT Service page reports for @gcloud.ua.es Gemini and NotebookLM data treatment; no broader privacy guarantee is inferred.
Approve as a narrow training/offering claim; this is not a binding assessment or academic-integrity rule.

artifacts.title: University of Alicante staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence identifies official University of Alicante pages for generative-AI teaching resources, AI services accessible with UA accounts, service-specific data-treatment statements for Gemini and NotebookLM with @gcloud.ua.es, and ICE teaching-staff training on ChatGPT in university teaching. No binding university-wide academic-integrity rule for student generative-AI use was found in the claim-grade official sources reviewed.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Claims are staged agent-reviewed candidates only and are not published canonical public facts.
The ICE resource and course pages are not treated as binding university-wide academic policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
